rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L. AUSTIN ET AL VS. SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE LLP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Debra Singletary And Request For Sanctions [Joinder]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Debra Singletary And Request For Sanctions [Joinder] GRANTED. Plaintiff to appear and sit for a deposition on a mutually agreeable date no later than April 30, 2018. If parties cannot agree on a date deposition shall take place on April 24, 2018. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,120 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2018 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2018 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Third Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed no later than April 17, 2018. All the amendments shall be (1) in bold (First Amended Cross-Complaint vs. Second Amended Cross Complaint) and (2) bold and underlined (Second Amended Cross-Complaint vs. Third Amended Cross-Complaint). The Court notes that the Third Amended Cross Complaint was properly rejected under CCP 430.41(e)(1) and CCP 472. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN CANNON VS. RITZ FIELDS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Marcus Allen Osuna Jones Regarding Compliance With Meet And Confer Requirements Of Code Of Civil Procedure 435.5 A
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2018 line 6. Defendant Marcus Allen Osuna Jones' Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify whether battery is alleged against Osuna (Complaint 11:7); if it is being alleged against Osuna, Plaintiff to allege each element of this cause of action against Osuna. = (501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN CANNON VS. RITZ FIELDS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
